headline: Robinhood launches Cortex AI — real-time market analysis and trade rationale for retail investors
the_so_what: Robinhood packaging institutional-grade research — aggregating news, analyst reports, social signals, and options flow into plain-English trade rationale — for 2M+ Gold subscribers commoditises the research function that traditional wealth firms relied on to justify advisory fees, following the same pattern Robinhood used to commoditise brokerage commissions in 2013.
summary: Robinhood has launched Cortex, an AI system that provides real-time market analysis, earnings summaries, and trade rationale for any equity or options position. Cortex aggregates news, analyst reports, social signals, and options flow to produce plain-English explanations of what is moving a stock and why. The product is aimed at democratizing institutional-grade research for retail investors. Early reviews highlight the quality of options flow interpretation as a genuine differentiator over competitors.

key_stat.label: Robinhood Gold subscribers with Cortex access

verified_claims: Cortex is an AI investment tool for real-time analysis and insights — confirmed
Stock Digests: summaries explaining stock movements — confirmed
Trade Builder: translates beliefs into options strategies — confirmed
Exclusive to Robinhood Gold members — confirmed
Does not place trades for users — confirmed (explicit disclaimer in source)
unverified_claims: Exact launch date not specified in source — says "later this year"
_governance.notes: Re-verified 2026-03-27 from Robinhood newsroom (URL redirected to robinhood.com/newsroom/). Source describes Cortex as conceptual framework at announcement; Trade Builder does not yet incorporate AI at launch.
